summary: Validated diagnostic deletion feature in /diagnostico > Banco. Admin can delete via trash icon with data-testid del-diag-{id}, viewer cannot see trash icons and is blocked at API level with 403.
passed: POST /api/diagnostics (admin) returns 200 with new diag id
DELETE /api/diagnostics/{id} as viewer returns 403 with message 'Permissão negada: usuário somente leitura'
GET /api/diagnostics confirms deleted item removed from list
UI: /diagnostico > Banco tab shows table with 7 header columns
UI: trash button [data-testid=del-diag-{id}] renders for admin and clicking it (with confirm accepted) removes the row from UI + backend
UI: viewer (viewer@fs.com) loads /diagnostico > Banco; zero trash buttons rendered (canEdit=false enforced)
